steps.title: Use a modifying phrase
steps.content: The blank sits between commas after and, so it must form a descriptive phrase about Yerevan rather than a new independent clause.

steps.title: Choose the participle
steps.content: Choice A creates a passive meaning that does not fit a city holding a population. Choice B and Choice D are finite verb forms, which break the modifier structure. A present participle correctly describes Yerevan as home to roughly one million people. The answer is C.
